typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Active profile relaunch hydration remains nondeterministic for legacy multi-row states because fetchActiveProfileState still reads `switcher_active_profile` with unordered `LIMIT 1`.
Failure paths in launchChrome/launchSafari return without calling coordinator.endLaunch, so pending launch state can remain stuck and trigger false 'already in progress' errors.

The new minimal-write invariant can still pass on full rewrites because it intersects content hashes, which are stable across re-projection; this does not guarantee failure when chunk IDs are fully regenerated.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit verification-only fix mode (or scoped-validation exception) for worker skills where the feature contract is proving existing behavior rather than implementing new logic.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both core-engine-close-test-target-membership-contract-gap and core-engine-fix-settings-edit-bindings reviews observed procedure requirements that mandated broader validation/manual steps than the narrow fix contracts required, while workers reported followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require handoff commit IDs to be machine-verifiable full SHAs (e.g., git rev-parse HEAD) and fail handoff validation if unresolved.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of core-engine-fix-browser-launch-cleanup-race found handoff commitId did not resolve via git show and had to be replaced by the actual commit SHA from history.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce required pre-read evidence in skill compliance reporting (AGENTS.md and required .factory/library files) before allowing followedProcedure=true in handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for core-engine-fix-browser-launch-cleanup-race and core-engine-restore-projection-minimal-write-signal both flagged missing required context reads in transcript skeletons despite followedProcedure=true reporting.

rejectedObservations.observation: Rename SwitcherSettingsUITests because naming may imply full UI coverage.
Single-review claim about one worker session skipping AGENTS/library reads without repeat pattern.
